reasoning: Initial state shows R1=10, R2=5, total_resistance=15. This suggests a series circuit where total = R1 + R2 (10+5=15). I will increase R1 to test if total_resistance increases by the same amount, confirming the linear relationship.

The initial state showed R1=10, R2=5, total_resistance=15, suggesting total = R1 + R2. After increasing R1 to 20, the total_resistance became 25. The difference in R1 was 10 (20-10), and the difference in total_resistance was 10 (25-15). This confirms the linear additive relationship. I have sufficient evidence to conclude the equation is total_resistance = R1 + R2.
